analysis.reasoning: Core message: On Inauguration Day, President von der Leyen calls for global cooperation to tackle the pandemic and expresses hope that the U.S. will join the COVAX facility, highlighting multilateral action. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story): Not directly; no reference to EU’s historical success or overcoming internal obstacles. EU2 (EU is united): Not addressed; no mention of EU internal unity or solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens): Focus is global (COVAX, U.S. participation), not on internal EU benefits. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor): No claim of pioneering regulation or leadership beyond general cooperation. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes): Not about human rights or defending specific fair causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): Yes; it promotes the EU’s role in multilateral cooperation (COVAX) and global well-being during the pandemic, implying EU engagement to improve global health and inviting U.S. partnership.
